title: Add time on behalf of teammates using the time tracking tool
excerpt:

posts.author: akalutkiewicz (Anne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Having some sort of ‘admin’ rights that would allow me to add time on behalf of my different teammates using the time tracking feature would really make things easier for us. My teammates can’t always log in to add their time and its often easier for me to report for them. I can’t believe this hasn’t been requested before, it would 100% make Monday more efficient for my team. We are currently trying to assess workloads for team members and timelines for our different projects, I really need to have this data as swiftly as possible, I really don’t see why I couldnt use an excel sheet as this point if Monday doesnt allow simple features like that.

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anne (@akalutkiewicz), have you looked at any third party apps such as Clockify for time/project management that integrates with monday? You can add in times for certain projects etc. in there.

You might find these useful:
Project and Time Management
Clockify Integration
Resource Management
Resource Management in monday.com

I hope this helps.

Kindest,
Amber
amber@upstreamtech.io | +64 8 7170 5246

posts.author: akalutkiewicz (Anne)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there really no way to not have to use a paid third party app? Since my company already pays for a Monday pro plan, we’d like to have to have the native features reflect and support our needs (and I don’t think the requested feature is such a stretch to ask for)
